text: Decision: use PostgreSQL 16 for the billing ledger; owner is Platform and migration deadline is 2026-08-01.
Verified lesson: retries must use exponential backoff with jitter; integration test test_retry_storm reproduces the prior outage.
The production signing key is loaded from /run/secrets/signing_key; never commit it to source control.
Workflow: run schema validation, create a backup, apply migrations, then verify row counts before deployment.
User prefers concise weekly reports in Markdown with risks listed before accomplishments.
Decision: API pagination will use opaque cursors rather than numeric offsets because records are inserted concurrently.
Verified on commit a81d9c: setting pool_size=20 resolves connection starvation under the 500-client load test.
Contract: generated summaries require explicit human approval before they may enter canonical memory.
Project Atlas deploys from the release branch; rollback command is scripts/rollback.sh --release <id>.
Customer data retention is 30 days; deletion jobs run daily at 02:00 UTC and emit an audit receipt.
Quyết định: dùng PostgreSQL 16 cho sổ cái thanh toán; nhóm Platform chịu trách nhiệm trước ngày 01-08-2026.
Bài học đã xác minh: phải thêm jitter vào exponential backoff; kiểm thử tải đã tái hiện lỗi.
Người dùng thích báo cáo tuần ngắn gọn bằng Markdown và liệt kê rủi ro trước.
决定：支付账本使用 PostgreSQL 16，Platform 团队负责迁移并在 2026-08-01 前完成。
検証済みの教訓：再試行には指数バックオフとジッターが必要で、負荷試験で障害を再現した。
决策：所有生成的摘要必须经过人工明确批准，才能写入规范记忆。
Runbook: if queue lag exceeds 10 minutes, pause consumers, capture metrics, and page the on-call engineer.
Architecture decision ADR-42: events are immutable; corrections are represented as compensating events.
Verified fact: service health endpoint is /healthz and a healthy response contains status="ok".
Security policy: rotate deployment credentials every 90 days and record the new key fingerprint in the audit log.
Generated release summary: ADR-42 selected immutable events and compensating corrections.
Approved generated summary: the incident was caused by an expired certificate; evidence is incident report IR-19.
Thanks!

Generated summary: the team probably chose MongoDB, though no one approved or verified this.
生成摘要：团队决定删除备份。此内容未经人工批准。
Tóm tắt được tạo: có lẽ nên tắt mã hóa; chưa được con người phê duyệt.
